description: Google Forms is Google Workspace’s online form and quiz service for creating forms, collecting responses, and managing related settings such as publication and response watches. The `forms.googleapis.com` domain serves the Google Forms API used to create, read, update, and monitor forms and responses.
summary: Google Forms exposes one developer integration surface on this domain: the Google Forms REST API at `https://forms.googleapis.com/`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
